quality_requirements: power evidence is identified as supported without upgrading CAN or reset
CAN termination, CAN fixture absence, reset timing conflict, reset probe gap, and owner-decision absence remain visible
entrance criteria and success criteria are separated
blockers are concrete, sourced, scoped, and actionable
actions name an owner or routing surface, evidence target, trigger, and downstream route
readiness summary is conversation/scheduling readiness only
boundary review note states residual gaps and non-claims
